# CWE-79 positive: reflected HTML without escaping
lang: go
file: CWE-79-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
// Vulnerable line: writes raw query value into HTML response.
func GreetVisitor(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Query("name")
	page := fmt.Sprintf("<html><body><h1>Hello %s</h1></body></html>", name)
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/html; charset=utf-8", []byte(page))
}
